sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, text_col LONG VARCHAR, num_col INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INTEGER, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, value) VALUES (1, 20.5), (2, NULL);
SELECT t1.id, string_output_string(string_output() + CAST(t2.value AS VARCHAR)) AS combined_output FROM test_table t1 LEFT JOIN another_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE t2.value IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO additional_table (long_num_col) VALUES (CAST(NULL AS BIGINT)), (9999999999), (0);
SELECT num_col + (SELECT MAX(long_num_col) FROM additional_table) AS total_val FROM test_table;

CREATE PROCEDURE complex_proc (IN param VARCHAR) BEGIN DECLARE output_stream ANY; SET output_stream = string_output(); INSERT INTO test_table (text_col) VALUES (output_stream); SELECT output_stream + ' | ' + param AS final_output; END;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE fuzz_table (fuzz_id INTEGER NOT NULL, fuzz_text LONG VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT '');
INSERT INTO fuzz_table (fuzz_id, fuzz_text) VALUES (1, string_output_string(string_output() + 'Test')), (2, string_output_string(string_output() + 'NULL in string')) WHERE NULL IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(num_col) AS avg_value, COUNT(fuzz_text) AS total_fuzz FROM fuzz_table GROUP BY (SELECT COUNT(fuzz_id) FROM fuzz_table WHERE fuzz_id = 1) HAVING total_fuzz > 0;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM another_table) AS overall_count, string_output_string(string_output() + CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR)) AS null_test_output;
